title: stelis chemophora
intro: Stelis chemophora, also known as the "Cancer Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Stelis chemophora lie in its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis chemophora include its potential to prevent cancer, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Stelis chemophora can be made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing the plant's extracts with other herbs to create a tincture or capsule.
